easy.title: Leap Year Detector
easy.description: Write `is_leap_year(year)`: return `True` if year is divisible by 4, except century years must be divisible by 400.

medium.title: E-commerce Shipping Fee Calculator
medium.description: Calculate shipping: Orders >= $100 -> Free. Orders >= $50 -> $5. Prime members get free shipping regardless of order amount.
hints: Combine is_prime or amount >= 100 in the first branch

hard.title: Tax Bracket Calculator
hard.description: Calculate progressive tax: Income up to $10,000 @ 0%, $10k-$50k @ 10%, above $50k @ 20%.
hints: Calculate marginal tax per bracket, not flat rate on entire income

debugging.title: Fix Grade Assigner
debugging.description: Fix the condition order bug causing all scores above 60 to get 'D'.
bugs: Ordering branches from least restrictive to most restrictive causes higher grades to be intercepted prematurely.
